refinement_sections.content: I need to evaluate an investment proposal for a manufacturing company. The proposal is about buying new machines and renovating a facility to increase production. I have to prepare a report that includes financial calculations.
The report should include Net Present Value (NPV) and Internal Rate of Return (IRR). I also need to find out the renovation costs and changes in working capital, which are not provided.
I need to assume a discount rate for my calculations, but I don't know how to choose it since the proposal doesn't explain it.
At the end of the report, I should give a recommendation on whether to go ahead with the investment based on financial numbers and some business factors.
I will need to present my findings to the senior management team, so I should make sure my report is clear and understandable.
